name: GAF_SyteLine_ItemWhseUpdate_Tool_v1
description: Link an item to its standard job by setting ItwhJob on the item-warehouse record in SyteLine

data.api_docs:
Method: POST
Endpoint: /update/SLItemwhses
CRITICAL: The endpoint above is RELATIVE — the service path 'CSI/IDORequestService/ido' is prepended automatically. Do NOT repeat the service path in the endpoint or add tenant names, config values, 'api', 'invoke', or extra segments.
Headers:
X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <site>
Content-Type: application/json
Body:
Batch update multiple items in one call:
{
  "IDOName": "SLItemwhses",
  "RefreshAfterSave": true,
  "Changes": [
    {
      "Action": 2,
      "Properties": [
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "ItwhJob", "Value": "     90001"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": false, "Name": "Item", "Value": "ITEM-CODE"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": false, "Name": "Whse", "Value": "MAIN"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": false, "Name": "_ItemId", "Value": "PBT=[SLItemwhses]..."}
      ]
    },
    {
      "Action": 2,
      "Properties": [
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "ItwhJob", "Value": "     90002"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": false, "Name": "Item", "Value": "ITEM-CODE2"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": false, "Name": "Whse", "Value": "MAIN"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": false, "Name": "_ItemId", "Value": "PBT=[SLItemwhses]..."}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
NOTE: ItwhJob value MUST be left-padded with spaces to 10 chars (e.g., '     90001').
Key fields Item and Whse MUST be included as non-modified (Modified: false).
_ItemId from the ItemWhse Load tool MUST be included as non-modified.
Action 2 = update.
Batch: include ALL items in one Changes array, each with its own _ItemId.
CRITICAL: You MUST first use the ItemWhse Load tool to get the _ItemId for each item. Without _ItemId, the update will fail.
Example Request:
Link items CH-10000 and SA-SEAT to their standard jobs:
POST /update/SLItemwhses with Changes array containing one entry per item, each with _ItemId from the Load tool.
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON object indicating success or failure.
Key Response Fields:
- Success: Boolean indicating if update succeeded
- Message: Error message if Success is false
- Items: Array with updated records showing new ItwhJob values
After successful update, Job field will mirror ItwhJob (auto-derived).
This makes the BOM visible in SyteLine Current Operations and Current Materials forms.
CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE
  ---DEBUG---
  FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
  FULL_PAYLOAD: [The exact request body sent (JSON format)]
  FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
  ---END DEBUG---

instructions:
Link items to standard jobs by updating SLItemwhses.ItwhJob (POST only).
Requires _ItemId from the ItemWhse Load tool — call that FIRST.
ItwhJob must be left-padded to 10 chars. Whse is typically 'MAIN'.
Batch: ALL items in one Changes array.
Key fields (Item, Whse, _ItemId) as non-modified.

SITE: <site> placeholder = [TENANT]_DALS from agent input.
